name: who-is-the-spy
description: 谁是卧底 / Who is the Spy — multi-device party game (each player on their own phone)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @spy/server" "npm run dev -w @spy/client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @spy/shared && npm run typecheck -w @spy/server && npm run typecheck -w @spy/client
